story.tasks:
- Task 1: E2E Jest Configuration (AC: 9.4.1, 9.4.8) - Subtask 1.1: `test/jest-e2e.json` dosyası oluştur - Subtask 1.2: testRegex: `.e2e-spec.ts$` pattern ayarla - Subtask 1.3: transform ve moduleNameMapper ayarları ekle - Subtask 1.4: package.json'a `"test:e2e": "jest --config ./test/jest-e2e.json"` script ekle - Subtask 1.5: Verify E2E config ile test discovery çalışıyor
- Task 2: E2E Test Infrastructure Setup (AC: 9.4.3, 9.4.5) - Subtask 2.1: `test/auth.e2e-spec.ts` dosyası oluştur - Subtask 2.2: Import supertest (`import * as request from 'supertest'`) - Subtask 2.3: Import test/setup.ts helpers (setupTestDatabase) - Subtask 2.4: beforeAll: TestingModule.createTestingModule({ imports: [AppModule] }) - Subtask 2.5: beforeAll: app.init() - Full app bootstrap - Subtask 2.6: beforeAll: Get PrismaService instance - Subtask 2.7: beforeEach: Database cleanup (setupTestDatabase) - Subtask 2.8: afterAll: app.close() - Cleanup
- Task 3-8: Complete Auth Flow E2E Test - Registration, Email Verification, Login, Protected Route Access, Token Refresh, Logout - Task 9: Seed Data Helper for E2E (AC: 9.4.5) - Task 10: Run and Validate E2E Tests (AC: 9.4.8)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
### AC-9.4.1: E2E Jest Configuration **Given** E2E testleri için ayrı bir Jest konfigürasyonu gerekli **When** `test/jest-e2e.json` dosyası oluşturulduğunda **Then**: - E2E-specific Jest configuration mevcut - testRegex: `.e2e-spec.ts$` pattern ile sadece E2E testleri çalıştırılıyor - transform: ts-jest ile TypeScript desteği aktif - moduleNameMapper: Path aliases (@/) çalışıyor - testEnvironment: node
### AC-9.4.2: Complete Auth Flow E2E Test **Given** authentication flow complete user journey olarak test edilmeli **When** `test/auth.e2e-spec.ts` dosyası oluşturulduğunda ve execute edildiğinde **Then**: - Test case: Complete auth flow journey - Step 1: POST /auth/register - User registration - Step 2: POST /auth/verify-email - Email verification with OTP - Step 3: POST /auth/login - User login, JWT token alınıyor - Step 4: GET /users/profile - Protected route access with JWT - Step 5: POST /auth/refresh - Token refresh - Step 6: POST /auth/logout - User logout - Her step'te HTTP status code ve response body doğrulanıyor - JWT token'lar successive request'lerde kullanılıyor - Database state verification her critical step'te yapılıyor
### AC-9.4.3: Full Application Bootstrap for E2E **Given** E2E testleri production-like environment'ta çalışmalı **When** E2E test suite execute edildiğinde **Then**: - Full NestJS application bootstrap edilmiş (AppModule ile) - Real HTTP requests via supertest - Test database (`boilerplate_test`) ile bağlantı kurulmuş - Tüm modules, guards, interceptors, pipes aktif - ValidationPipe, ExceptionFilter gibi global config'ler uygulanmış - `app.init()` ile application initialize edilmiş
### AC-9.4.4: Supertest HTTP Request Testing **Given** E2E testleri real HTTP request'ler göndermeli **When** supertest kullanılarak endpoint'ler test edildiğinde **Then**: - `request(app.getHttpServer())` pattern kullanılıyor - HTTP method'lar: GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE test ediliyor - Request headers set ediliyor (Authorization: Bearer ) - Request body JSON format'ında gönderiliyor - Response assertions: status code, body structure, data validation - Cookie handling (refresh token cookie varsa)
### AC-9.4.5: Database Isolation and Seed Data **Given** E2E testleri isolated environment'ta çalışmalı **When** E2E test suite execute edildiğinde **Then**: - Test database kullanılıyor (production DB'ye dokunulmuyor) - `beforeAll`: Database connection kurulmuş - `beforeEach`: Database tables temizlenmiş (test/setup.ts kullanarak) - Test scenario'ya özgü seed data oluşturuluyor (domain, user, permissions) - `afterEach`: Test data cleanup yapılıyor - `afterAll`: Database connection kapatılmış, app.close() çağrılmış
### AC-9.4.6-9: JWT Token Flow, Email Verification OTP, NPM Script, Error Handling

artifact.title: Epic 9 Technical Specification - Testing Infrastructure
artifact.snippet: E2E testleri complete user journeys test eder. Full NestJS application bootstrap, real HTTP requests via supertest, production-like environment with all guards/pipes/filters active. Performance target: < 30 seconds for complete auth flow.

artifact.title: Epic 9 Technical Specification
artifact.section: APIs and Interfaces → E2E Test Pattern
artifact.snippet: E2E test setup: TestingModule.createTestingModule({ imports: [AppModule] }), app.useGlobalPipes(ValidationPipe), supertest for HTTP requests, database state verification after operations.

artifact.title: Epic 9 Technical Specification
artifact.section: Workflows and Sequencing → E2E Test Workflow
artifact.snippet: E2E workflow: Bootstrap (full app startup) → Scenario (complete user journey: register → verify → login → access → refresh → logout) → Assertions (HTTP status, body, auth state, DB consistency) → Shutdown.

artifact.title: Epic 9 Technical Specification
artifact.section: Data Models and Contracts → E2E Configuration Schema
artifact.snippet: jest-e2e.json structure: testRegex: ".e2e-spec.ts$", transform: ts-jest, moduleNameMapper: path aliases, testEnvironment: node.

artifact.title: Epic 9: Testing Infrastructure
artifact.snippet: E2E infrastructure for complete user journey testing. Requirements: jest-e2e.json configuration, complete auth flow E2E test, supertest integration, database isolation.

artifact.title: Story 9.3: Integration Test Setup
artifact.snippet: Integration test infrastructure completed. Test database setup (test/setup.ts), guards override pattern, Turkish phone format (+905XXXXXXXXX), supertest import pattern, 12 tests passing in 1.262s.

artifact.reason: ALREADY EXISTS - E2E Jest configuration with testRegex, transform, moduleNameMapper. Story 9.4 may need to verify or enhance this configuration.
EXISTING E2E TEST - Auth registration E2E test already implemented. Pattern: TestingModule bootstrap, supertest, seedTestData, cleanupTestData, TransformResponseInterceptor.
EXISTING E2E TEST - OTP-based login E2E test exists. May be referenced for OTP verification patterns.
EXISTING E2E TEST - Token refresh E2E test exists. May be referenced for refresh token flow.
EXISTING E2E TEST - Logout E2E test exists. May be referenced for logout flow.
EXISTING E2E TEST - User profile endpoint E2E test exists. May be referenced for protected route testing.
CRITICAL REUSE - Database cleanup utility from Story 9.3. Provides setupTestDatabase() for table cleanup in correct FK order. Essential for E2E test database isolation.
EXISTING UTILITIES - Test data seeding and cleanup utilities used in existing E2E tests. Essential for E2E test data management.
E2E setup file that loads .env.test before E2E tests run.
Full application module used for E2E test bootstrap. TestingModule.createTestingModule({ imports: [AppModule] }).
Auth endpoints under test: register, verify-email, login, refresh, logout.
Auth service with business logic for authentication flow. Real service (not mocked) in E2E tests.
User profile endpoints (GET /users/profile) - protected routes for JWT testing.
Response transformation interceptor applied globally in E2E tests (same as main.ts). Required for consistent response format.

npm.package: Core test framework for E2E tests
HTTP assertion library for E2E HTTP requests
I18n service for response transformation interceptor

story-context.constraints: - **E2E vs Integration Tests**: E2E tests MUST use full application bootstrap with ALL guards/pipes/filters active (no guard overrides). Integration tests may override guards for speed. - **Real Authentication**: E2E tests MUST use real JWT authentication flow. No mocking of authentication - actual login required. - **Complete Journeys**: E2E tests focus on complete user flows across multiple endpoints, not isolated endpoint testing. - **Test File Location**: E2E tests must be in `test/*.e2e-spec.ts`, NOT in `src/modules/*/tests/`. - **Database Isolation**: MUST use test database (boilerplate_test). Production database must NEVER be touched by tests. - **Performance Target**: Complete auth flow E2E test MUST execute in < 30 seconds (per Tech Spec). - **Supertest Import**: Use `import request from 'supertest'` (default import) not `import * as request`. - **Response Format**: Expect transformed responses with { success, status, data, message } structure (TransformResponseInterceptor). - **Turkish Phone Format**: +905XXXXXXXXX (10 digits after +905 prefix) for phone number validation. - **Test Isolation**: Each test MUST start with clean database state. Use setupTestDatabase() in beforeEach. - **Seed Data Strategy**: Use test/utils seedTestData() and cleanupTestData() functions. Generate unique test domain IDs per test suite. - **Global Config**: Apply same global config as main.ts - ValidationPipe, TransformResponseInterceptor. - **Test Timeout**: E2E tests have 30 second timeout (configured in jest-e2e.json).

tests.standards: E2E testing standards from Tech Spec Epic 9: 1. **Full Application Bootstrap**: Use TestingModule with AppModule, apply all global pipes/interceptors/filters 2. **Real Authentication**: No guard overrides, use actual JWT tokens from login 3. **Complete Journeys**: Test full user flows (register → verify → login → access → refresh → logout) 4. **Database Isolation**: Test database (boilerplate_test), clean state with setupTestDatabase() 5. **Supertest**: Real HTTP requests to app.getHttpServer() 6. **Performance**: < 30 seconds for complete auth flow 7. **Existing E2E Tests**: Reference test/auth-registration.e2e-spec.ts, test/auth-login-otp.e2e-spec.ts for patterns 8. **Test Utilities**: Use test/utils.ts functions (seedTestData, cleanupTestData, generateTestDomainId, generateUniquePhoneNumber) 9. **Response Format**: Expect TransformResponseInterceptor format: { success, status, data, message } 10. **Test Isolation**: Unique domain ID per test suite, cleanup after each test
tests.locations: - `test/*.e2e-spec.ts` - E2E test files (NOT in src/) - `test/jest-e2e.json` - E2E Jest configuration - `test/setup.ts` - Database cleanup utilities - `test/utils.ts` - Test data seeding/cleanup utilities - `test/jest-e2e-setup.ts` - E2E setup to load .env.test - `test/jest-global-setup.ts` - Global setup for E2E tests - `test/jest-global-teardown.ts` - Global teardown for E2E tests
tests.ideas:
**Test Ideas for Story 9.4:**
**IMPORTANT DISCOVERY**: Multiple E2E tests already exist for auth flow! Instead of creating new test, this story should: 1. **Document/verify existing E2E infrastructure**: jest-e2e.json, test/utils.ts, seedTestData pattern 2. **Create comprehensive auth flow test**: Combine existing separate tests (registration, login, refresh, logout) into ONE complete journey test 3. **Verify all acceptance criteria**: Check that existing infrastructure meets AC 9.4.1, 9.4.3, 9.4.4, 9.4.5, 9.4.8
**Test: Complete Auth Flow Journey (AC 9.4.2)** - Step 1: Register user (existing pattern in test/auth-registration.e2e-spec.ts) - Step 2: Verify email with OTP (pattern in test/auth-login-otp.e2e-spec.ts) - Step 3: Login (existing test/auth-login-*.e2e-spec.ts) - Step 4: Access protected route GET /users/profile (pattern in test/users-profile.e2e-spec.ts) - Step 5: Refresh token (existing test/auth-refresh-token.e2e-spec.ts) - Step 6: Logout (existing test/auth-logout.e2e-spec.ts)
**Error Case Tests (AC 9.4.9)** - Register with existing email → 409 - Login with wrong password → 401 - Access protected route without token → 401 - Refresh with invalid token → 401 - Email verification with invalid OTP → 400
**Verification Tests (AC 9.4.1, 9.4.8)** - Verify jest-e2e.json exists and configured correctly - Verify npm run test:e2e command works - Verify E2E tests run with correct pattern matching
**Database Isolation Tests (AC 9.4.5)** - Verify test database used (not production) - Verify cleanup between tests - Verify seed data strategy
